Class OpenAiCompatibleResponseAdapter

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible.adapter.OpenAiCompatibleResponseAdapter
public class OpenAiCompatibleResponseAdapter extends Object
A specialized content adapter that translates Anahata's domain model into standard OpenAI-compatible JSON objects for the Chat Completion API.

This adapter follows the Anahata V2 pruning and metadata strategies, ensuring that models remain context-aware by injecting metadata headers even for effectively pruned parts.

Role Mapping:

  • Role.USER → "user"
  • Role.MODEL → "assistant"
  • Role.SYSTEM → "system"

Turn Synthesis: For Model turns containing tool responses, it generates an 'assistant' message (calls) followed by one 'tool' message per response.

Author:
anahata

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final AbstractMessage
    anahataMessage
    The Anahata message to be translated.
    private final boolean
    includePruned
    Whether to include the full content of parts that have been effectively pruned.
    private final OpenAiCompatibleReasoningStyle
    reasoningStyle
    Reasoning style of the target model.
    private final List<String>
    reasoningTags
    Tags used for reasoning (e.g., ["<think>", "</think>"]).
    private final TokenizerType
    tokenizerType
    The tokenizer used to count parts accurately for the CwGC.

    • anahataMessage

      private final AbstractMessage anahataMessage
      The Anahata message to be translated.

    • includePruned

      private final boolean includePruned
      Whether to include the full content of parts that have been effectively pruned.

    • tokenizerType

      private final TokenizerType tokenizerType
      The tokenizer used to count parts accurately for the CwGC.

    • reasoningStyle

      private final OpenAiCompatibleReasoningStyle reasoningStyle
      Reasoning style of the target model.

    • reasoningTags

      private final List<String> reasoningTags
      Tags used for reasoning (e.g., ["<think>", "</think>"]).

  • Method Details

    • toOpenAi

      public List<com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode> toOpenAi()
      Translates the Anahata message into a list of OpenAI-style JSON message nodes.
      Returns:
      A list of ObjectNodes representing the messages.

    • toOpenAiModel

      private List<com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode> toOpenAiModel(AbstractModelMessage<?> modelMsg)
      Synthesizes a Model turn into 'assistant' and 'tool' messages.
      Parameters:
      modelMsg - the source Anahata model message.
      Returns:
      a list of synthesized assistant and tool message nodes.

    • toOpenAiUser

      private com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode toOpenAiUser()
      Translates USER or SYSTEM messages, supporting multimodal content arrays.
      Returns:
      the constructed user or system message node.

    • addPartWithMetadata

      private void addPartWithMetadata(StringBuilder textContent, com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ArrayNode toolCalls, AbstractPart part)
      Internal helper for metadata interleaving in the assistant buffer.
      Parameters:
      textContent - the text buffer being accumulated.
      toolCalls - the tool calls array node being populated.
      part - the part being processed.

    • shouldInjectInbandMetadata

      private boolean shouldInjectInbandMetadata()
      Determines if in-band metadata headers should be injected into the payload.

      This check combines the global request configuration policy with the message's individual metadata capability.

      Returns:
      true if metadata injection is enabled and applicable.
